title: 童年的樂章
lyrics_text:
[verse]
童年時光在跑動間流過
歡笑聲中，童年的夢想飛向天際
手捧風光，心隨風舞動
[chorus]
童年的笑容，如歌如畫如詩如畫
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 5.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 7.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 1 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 3 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 1 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["聲調：避免連續相同聲調，注意每行第二、四字的平仄交替。", "押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "連貫性：加入重複副歌段落以強化整體結構感。"]
